associatedMedia.headline: Kilchurn Castle was built in the mid-1400s, and it remained the base of the mighty Campbells of Glenorchy for 150 years. After the first Jacobite Rising of 1689, Kilchurn was converted into a garrison stronghold, but was abandoned by the end of the 1700s.

Kilchurn Castle, Loch Awe, Argyll, Scotland

zh.lifeSummary: John - Iain MacDougall 11th of Dunollie and Lorn是Allan Macdougall Of Dunollie和Catherine MacEachen的兒子，於1370年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾登利。他於大約1410年與Gyllis "Egidia" Campbell在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1443年在他的家鄉享年73歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾。

nameMeanings.name: MacDougall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDougall
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Dubhghaill, ‘son of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was originally a byname used to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from the fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDowell and Doyle .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Iain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: John - Iain MacDougall 11th of Dunollie and Lorn was born in 1370, in Dunollie, Argyll, Scotland as the son of Allan Macdougall Of Dunollie and Catherine MacEachen. He married Gyllis "Egidia" Campbell about 1410, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1443, in his hometown, at the age of 73, and was buried in Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: John - Iain MacDougall 11th of Dunollie and Lorn est né en 1370, à Dunollie, Argyll, Écosse, fils de Allan Macdougall Of Dunollie et Catherine MacEachen. Il a épousé Gyllis "Egidia" Campbell environ 1410, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1443, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: John - Iain MacDougall 11th of Dunollie and Lorn wurde 1370 in Dunollie, Argyll, Scotland, als Sohn von Allan Macdougall Of Dunollie und Catherine MacEachen geboren. Er hat um 1410 in Argyll, Scotland Gyllis "Egidia" Campbell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1443 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John - Iain MacDougall 11th of Dunollie and Lorn è nato il nel 1370 nel Dunollie, Argyll, Scotland come figlio di Allan Macdougall Of Dunollie e Catherine MacEachen. Lui sposato Gyllis "Egidia" Campbell circa 1410, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1443, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John - Iain MacDougall 11th of Dunollie and Lornは1370年にスコットランドアルグイルダノリーでAllan Macdougall Of DunollieとCatherine MacEachenの息子として生まれた。約1410年にスコットランドアルグイルでGyllis "Egidia" Campbellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1443年に故郷で73歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルにて埋葬された。

ko.Dunollych, (Dunollie), Argyllshire, Scot: 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트 던리
ko.lifeSummary: John - Iain MacDougall 11th of Dunollie and Lorn(은)는 1370년 스컷랜드 아그이 던리에서 Allan Macdougall Of Dunollie(와)과 Catherine MacEachen의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1410년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Gyllis "Egidia" Campbell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1443년 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John - Iain MacDougall 11th of Dunollie and Lorn nasceu em 1370, em Dunollie, Argyll, Scotland filho de Allan Macdougall Of Dunollie e Catherine MacEachen. Ele casou-se com Gyllis "Egidia" Campbell aproximadamente 1410, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1443, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Argyll, Scotland.

ru.Dunollych, (Dunollie), Argyllshire, Scot: дунолли, аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: John - Iain MacDougall 11th of Dunollie and Lorn родился в 1370 г. в местности дунолли, аргилл, Шотландия. Его родителей звали Allan Macdougall Of Dunollie и Catherine MacEachen. Он женился на женщине по имени Gyllis "Egidia" Campbell около 1410 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1443 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: John - Iain MacDougall 11th of Dunollie and Lorn nació en 1370, en Dunollie, Argyll, Scotland como hijo de Allan Macdougall Of Dunollie y Catherine MacEachen. Se casó con Gyllis "Egidia" Campbell aproximadamente 1410, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1443, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Argyll, Scotland.
